title: Best platform for instant TradingView alerts → broker execution
author: Low_Proposal_6903
selftext:
Im looking for recommendations on the best platform or service to connect TradingView alerts to my broker via API with the lowest possible delay.

Current setup:
	•	TradingView → TraderSpot (API/webhook)
	•	Experiencing ~1 to 1.5 seconds delay
	•	I’m scalping, and this latency sometimes hurts my PnL.

Any suggestions?

comments.author: GoodNeat1609
comments.body: For pure speed, you’ll get more by shortening the chain than swapping tools: TV webhook → lightweight Flask/FastAPI endpoint on a VPS close to your broker → broker API. Ditch extra hops, strip logging, and keep the handler in-memory so it just validate → normalize → send. Also check broker side: some REST gateways are slower than their FIX/WS endpoints. I’ve used Alpaca + custom FastAPI, others swear by IBKR + local gateway; DreamFactory helps when you want a clean REST layer over your trade DB without bloating the hot path. Main thing is: fewer services, closer to the matching engine.
